questionHtml:
An oval-shaped stem cell cluster is shown in the micrograph.

[Source: Sontag, S., Förster, M., Seré, K. and Zenke, M., 2017. [online] Available at: https://bio-protocol.org/e2419 [Accessed
6 December 2019]. Source adapted.]

Discuss how the use of stem cells to treat hereditary diseases could affect the person who received the treatment and their progeny.
markschemeHtml:
1. could improve quality/length of life of the treated person;
  2. disease could still be passed on to progeny if defective gene/allele in gametes is not replaced/changed;

meta.title: Discuss how the use of stem cells to treat hereditary diseases could affect the person who received the treatment and their progeny.
